name: AtomicMemory
description: Persistent semantic memory for OpenClaw agents — cross-channel user memory and deterministic session snapshots via the AtomicMemory SDK's pluggable MemoryProvider model.

apiUrl.description: Optional provider base URL. Defaults to the local AtomicMemory core for provider=atomicmemory. Required for provider=mem0.

apiKey.description: Optional bearer credential forwarded to AtomicMemory core as Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>.

provider.description: Provider name dispatched through the SDK's MemoryProvider model. Defaults to AtomicMemory local core.

scope.description: Optional scope overrides. The plugin defaults `user` to the local machine user when omitted.

user.description: Stable channel-agnostic user identity. Defaults to the local machine user.

agent.description: Optional agent identity for agent-specific memory.

thread.description: Optional conversation or task thread boundary.
